title: Youth in Competitive Sports
theme: Youth competitive sports: performance pressure, mental health, injury risk, equity of access, and technology-enhanced training.

title: Growing Population and Resource Limits
theme: Population growth: demographic shifts, resource demand, urban expansion, aging societies, and migration patterns.

title: Neurotechnology Future Scene
theme: Medical Rehabilitation-Focused Neurotechnology: Rehab applications, state ethics review, consent, brain data security.

title: Genetics and Ancestry
theme: Genetics Ancestry and Ethnic Unity: Ethnic unity, anti-genetic discrimination, state-led data security, identity.

title: Nanotechnology in Daily Life
theme: Nanotechnology: smart materials, medicine, environmental cleanup, manufacturing change, and long-term safety and regulation.

title: Artificial Intelligence Governance and Ethics
theme: AI governance: algorithmic bias, transparency, labor impacts, concentration of power, and global rules for safe deployment.

title: Coping with Stress in High-Pressure Futures
theme: Future stress: hyper-competition, economic insecurity, digital overload, mental-health support, and resilience-building systems.

title: Future Criminal Justice system
theme: Tech-assisted criminal justice: precision, transparency, balanced punishment-rehabilitation, public trust.
